description: Movie-still quality scenes with dramatic lighting and deliberate composition. Named director references for specific visual languages. For content that needs to feel important.
base_prompt: cinematic film still, {scene_description}, {lighting_description}, directed by {director_reference}, shot on {camera}

scene.description: string — the moment being captured. e.g. 'a man alone in a glass-walled office at night, city lights behind him, staring at multiple monitors showing data dashboards'
subjects: array of people/objects with specific positions. e.g. 'man in dark fitted sweater, seated at desk, body facing monitors, head turned 30 degrees toward camera, face half-lit by screen glow'
scene.action: string — what's happening in this frozen moment. e.g. 'the exact moment of recognizing a pattern in the data — slight forward lean, hand paused over keyboard'
scene.narrative_tension: string — what story does this frame imply. e.g. 'the weight of a decision that will affect the company, isolation of leadership, late-night clarity'

environment.location: string — specific place. e.g. 'corner office on 30th floor, floor-to-ceiling glass on two walls'
environment.time: string — exact time and weather. e.g. '11:47pm, clear night, city lights visible for miles'
environment.production_design: string — e.g. 'minimalist modern with cold materials — glass, steel, concrete. Single warm element: amber whiskey in crystal glass on desk'
practical_lights: array of in-scene light sources. e.g. 'three monitors casting blue-white glow on face and desk', 'single desk lamp with warm Edison bulb behind monitors', 'city lights creating bokeh through rain-spotted windows'

camera.camera_model: string — e.g. 'ARRI Alexa Mini LF' for digital cinema, 'Panavision Millennium DXL2' for classic Hollywood
camera.lens: string — specific cinema lens. e.g. 'Cooke S7/i 40mm T2.0 anamorphic' or 'Zeiss Master Prime 50mm T1.3'
camera.aperture: string — e.g. 'T2.0, wide open for selective focus'
camera.shot_type: string — e.g. 'medium shot, subject positioned at left third of frame, negative space on right showing city through glass'
camera.movement: string — e.g. 'static, locked off on tripod, deliberate composed framing — this is a moment, not an action'
camera.aspect_ratio_native: string — e.g. '2.39:1 anamorphic widescreen' or '1.85:1 flat widescreen'

lighting.key_light: string — motivated, directional. e.g. 'monitor glow as key light, cool blue-white, illuminating left side of face with sharp falloff'
lighting.fill_light: string — e.g. 'city ambient through windows, very dim, just enough to separate subject from pure black'
lighting.practicals: string — e.g. 'desk lamp creates warm pool of light on papers and whiskey glass, contrasting with cool monitor light'
lighting.color_temperature: string — e.g. 'mixed: cool 6500K from screens, warm 2700K from desk lamp, creating deliberate color contrast on face'
lighting.contrast_ratio: string — e.g. '6:1 on face — dramatic but readable, shadow side has detail not pure black'

color_and_style.grade: string — specific DI reference. e.g. 'teal shadows with warm skin tones preserved, crushed blacks with slight blue shift, highlights roll off naturally — Deakins-style precision'
color_and_style.film_response: string or null — e.g. 'emulate ARRI LogC to Rec.709 with custom LUT, natural skin rolloff'
color_and_style.overall_style: string — e.g. 'The Social Network boardroom scene meets Sicario border crossing — cold precision with human warmth underneath'
color_and_style.director_reference: string — e.g. 'David Fincher' or 'Denis Villeneuve' or 'Sofia Coppola' or 'Christopher Nolan'

negative_prompt: no over-lit flat lighting — this is cinema not corporate video
no Dutch angles unless explicitly specified
no visible crew, equipment, or C-stands
no cheesy lens flares or anamorphic streak abuse
no color banding in dark gradients
no uncanny valley faces — if people are present they look real
no generic office stock photo staging

late_night_office.description: Solo founder working late. Isolation, focus, weight of decisions. Fincher energy.

scene.narrative_tension: the isolation of building something alone at night when the world is asleep

environment.production_design: minimal, cold materials, single warm accent

color_and_style.grade: teal shadows, warm skin, crushed blacks
color_and_style.overall_style: The Social Network meets Zodiac — obsessive late-night energy

morning_strategy.description: Early morning boardroom or kitchen table. The calm before execution. Villeneuve stillness.

scene.narrative_tension: the quiet moment of clarity before a big move — coffee, notes, the plan coming together

environment.time: 6:15am, dawn light just starting, pre-sunrise blue hour
environment.production_design: clean surfaces, morning ritual objects — coffee, notebook, phone face-down

lighting.key_light: pre-dawn blue light through windows, cool and ethereal
lighting.practicals: single warm kitchen light or candle

color_and_style.grade: blue hour desaturation, skin warmth preserved, lifted shadows
color_and_style.overall_style: Arrival morning scenes meets Blade Runner 2049 interiors — vast quiet spaces

deal_room.description: The moment a deal closes or a pitch lands. Controlled tension. Sorkin energy.

scene.narrative_tension: the held breath between the ask and the answer — professional stakes, human emotion

environment.time: 2:30pm, afternoon sun filtering through half-closed blinds
environment.production_design: upscale conference room, dark wood table, water glasses, documents, clean and powerful

camera.shot_type: tight medium shot across table, shallow focus on speaker, listener soft in foreground

lighting.key_light: afternoon sun through venetian blinds creating horizontal stripe shadows across room

color_and_style.grade: warm amber from sun, cool shadows in unlit areas, rich wood tones
color_and_style.overall_style: Steve Jobs conference room meets Moneyball negotiation — intellect meets stakes
